children.name: Product defects
Search modal is not present. Error (if present) -
Check of a book title and author in Overdrive
Audiobooks: Open the audiobook at the last open chapter and check time code
Check fields in Information section in Overdrive
Audiobooks: Check end of chapter sleep timer
Overdrive: Check of canceling the downloading from book details view
Audiobooks: Check closing playback speed and sleep timer
Epub: Open book to last page read
Epub: Navigate by bookmarks
Audiobooks: Playback speed: Check of playback speed
Button 'Listen' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) -
Audiobooks: Check time tracking line
Page number or chapter name is not correct (actualPageNumber - 6, expectedPageNumber - 7), (actualChapterName-Copyright, expectedChapterName-Copyright)
Epub: Navigate by Page
Search field does not contain newWord
Check the possibility of editing data in search field in LYRASIS ANDROID
Test defects
